log: === INITIATIVE ===

Young Red Dragon: 7 (d20:7 + 0)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Centaur — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Centaur — Bardic Musician casts Polymorph (4th level)
→ Centaur — Bardic Musician polymorphs into a Giant Ape! (157 HP, AC 12, multiattack: 2)
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 12] HIT! 14 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 143/157
→ Concentration save: [21 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 12] HIT! 20 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 123/157
→ Concentration save: [16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 12] HIT! 17 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 106/157
→ Centaur — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Polymorph
→ Centaur — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
⚡ Centaur — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:17 total 27 vs AC 12 — still hits.

=== ROUND 3 ===

Centaur — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)

→ 12 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Centaur — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Centaur — Bardic Musician for 6. HP: 49/67

Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Centaur — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
